pr.title: docs: May 2026 improvement plan checkboxes + documentation status tracker
pr.body: Second pass — Chris decisions applied (May 2026). ## Resolved (implemented in this PR) | # | Decision | Action | |---|----------|--------| | 1 | CLAUDE **B** | `CLAUDE.md` → agent pointer; body → `docs/CLAUDE_ARCHIVED.md` | | 2 | GDD **A** | → `docs/DEAD_DRIFT_GDD_ARCHIVED.md` with archive banner | | 5 | **MAX_VELOCITY 280** | Locked in IMPROVEMENT_PLAN; overdrive **420**; README + CLAUDE pointer | | 6 | Soundtrack status | Implementation status table in `SOUNDTRACK_PLAN.md` | | 7 | README **FULL** | Full player/dev feature overview | ## Pending — detail in `docs/DECISION_BRIEFS.md` (no code changes) | # | Topic | Status | |---|--------|--------| | 3 | Chapter theme order | Sector-by-sector tables; Ch 4 matches; Ch 1–3 differ | | 4 | Landing Beat 2 | Plan vs live SPACE physics; scoring math explained | Chris to reply with A/B/C or hybrid spec before we touch `procedural.py` or `delivery_sequence.py`. ## Files - `docs/IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md` — checkboxes + Phase 0 (unchanged from pass 1, MAX_VELOCITY updated) - `docs/DOCUMENTATION_STATUS.md` — decisions log - `docs/DECISION_BRIEFS.md` — **new** — full fork detail - `README.md` — full rewrite
pr.author: chris-dewitt
